chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.039 — Bonds Are Securities

The bonds issued and delivered under this chapter and interest coupons on the bonds are a security under Chapter 8 (Security Instruments) , Business & Commerce Code.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The bonds issued and delivered under this chapter and interest coupons on the bonds are a security under Chapter 8 (Security Instruments) , Business & Commerce Code.
